{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175805DB3AA4AF9C295BA3994B"}"},"total":76},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7583264606744822553","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"读完第一个副本，评价为九分甚至十分的不错，节奏把控的恰到好处，追更的时候真的是很期待[笑哭]，对人物的塑造也恰到好处，没有刻意为了主角而贬低其他人的情况，每个人都物尽其用。最后，这的确是作者大大新一本神作，即使前面看着不尽人意，但只要读进第一个副本你就出不去了[爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765620060,"group_id":"7574817252751461438","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N11yxnXVG6m8vr9gMlN6KqAHQVQHlGpx+K0VXdRnQI+b","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/86e24bd326e5429b83e2db979df6a4ad~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536236&x-signature=RBy6pXQfjVWFkuqOv7Dir1gesvk%3D","user_id":"3235198185253369","user_name":"十一微凉Rain."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3235198185253369","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574817252751461438","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+无女主+原创副本】
“欢迎来到灵异禁地，亲爱的使徒们！”
“这方世界即将寿尽，请尽情挣扎！”
当纸灰笼罩世界，现实与灵异逐渐重叠。
破旧的宗族公寓，溺毙的鬼童正在敲门。
消失的7号校舍，无头的男尸迷茫徘徊。
晦暗的道教宫观，璀璨的神像流下血泪……
“活下来，然后……释放你内心最深的欲望。”
“什么？你的欲望只是恢复健康？只是达成朋友的心愿？”
“这么卑贱的欲望，在禁地会死的很快哦！”
青年笑了，拖着残腿跨入禁地，撕开衣襟。
那座供奉于心口的诡异祠堂，吞吐出无数恶鬼。
“可我的朋友们，早就死了。”青年举起白幡，身后百鬼夜行：“你刚才，说谁卑贱来着？”
……
终于，世界崩坏，人间如狱。
当一切回归死寂，青年端坐鬼潮之上，招手轻笑：“欢迎你的到来，幸存者。我叫周岳，东岳的岳，欢迎见证……我的故事。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/35696bae6fb16c907ca0c68946a3fafb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"彤山煮茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7574817252751461438","book_name":"诡灾降临：灵异逃生从招魂开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7315人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7574826990725762072","read_count":"7315","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"796539"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"242","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,灵异,捉鬼,副本,无限流,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/35696bae6fb16c907ca0c68946a3fafb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184685&x-signature=QkmyR1tjODudxwbN6uiGVTIVlY4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"33"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175805DB3AA4AF9C295BA3994B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8980,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":6260},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7583524783386149656","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事真实细腻，衔接自然，作者埋的大量伏笔也一一写完，角色刻画深刻，有血有肉，无论主角还是次要人物都有详细的背景故事"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765679694,"group_id":"7574817252751461438","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7dXmcapOomG6a9SpsZas1s=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a6667dfa43034814b66d13ba193fbcc3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530407&x-signature=MtZvmIUXDwerouIkyoK3XQfpQCE%3D","user_id":"76457949466","user_name":"生死小刘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"76457949466","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574817252751461438","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+无女主+原创副本】
